task: The user mentions a city in passing (Reykjavik), asks an unrelated math question, then asks which country contains the city mentioned earlier. The agent must remember the city across turns and identify its country.

conversation_history.content: I'm planning a trip to Reykjavik.
What country is the city I mentioned earlier in?

notes: Tests passive memory (city mentioned in passing) and indirect co-reference ('the city I mentioned earlier').
